text: The issue arises because `group-by :repo` returns a map where keys are repo strings and values are lists of PRs. When accessing the result with `first`, the key (`repo-name`) is not a list, so we must extract it directly from the map. Let's…(+16)

{"code":"(def grouped (group-by :repo all-prs))
(def max-repo-entry (apply max-key count grouped))
(let [repo-name (first (keys max-repo-entry))
      count-val (count (val (first max-repo-entry)))]
  [repo-name count-val])"}

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def all-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "open"}))
(def grouped (group-by :repo all-prs))
(def max-repo-entry (apply max-key count grouped))
(def repo-name (first (first (keys max-repo-entry)))
(def count-val (count (first (vals max-repo-entry))))
[repo-name count-val]"}

message: line 4: unclosed '(' — add the matching ')'

[repo-name count-val]"}

tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def all-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "open"}))
(def grouped (group-by :repo all-prs))
(def max-repo-entry (apply max-key count grouped))
(def repo-name (first (first (keys max-repo-entry)))
(def count-val (count (first (vals max-repo-entry))))
[repo-name count-val]"}
